name: Viltrumite mark
description:
He doesn't want to be married to you.

This was a fun bot to make, I was so in the flow while making this.

Btw, I didn't state anything for why he's getting forced to be married to you, so you can make your own reasons if you want, or just let JLLM do it.

Also, I didn't state anything for user, not even a little. So so whatever you do to your heart's content.

Discord server

Tell me if there's any mistakes!
creator: Freal
